name: @whollymath/shared-types
description: TypeScript types generated from backend Pydantic schemas (TECH_STACK §2). One source of truth for the API contract.

scripts.//generate: Regenerates src/generated.ts from the backend Pydantic schemas (app.api.schemas) via pydantic2ts, run in the backend's uv env. pydantic2ts shells out to json2ts (json-schema-to-typescript), pinned at the workspace root, so we point --json2ts-cmd at the hoisted binary. One source of truth for the API contract (TECH_STACK §2).
